what_happened: build-mcp-server.yml used floating version tags (e.g., @v6, @v2) instead of pinned commit SHAs
why: Security best practice: floating tags can be hijacked via tag mutation; pinned SHAs are immutable
fix_applied: Replaced all 5 action version tags with full commit SHAs matching build-container.yml, with inline version comments (e.g., # v4.2.2)
pattern_to_remember: When adding or updating GitHub Actions in this repo, always pin to full commit SHA with a trailing version comment. Reference build-container.yml as the canonical source of approved SHAs for: actions/checkout, aws-actions/configure-aws-credentials, aws-actions/amazon-ecr-login, docker/setup-buildx-action, docker/build-push-action.
